query_parameters.additional_context: Assess US launch and competition outlook.

tasks.description: Assess Semaglutide patent and exclusivity constraints for US market entry timeline.
Review US clinical trial pipeline and outcome maturity for Semaglutide.
Estimate US diabetes market potential and competitive intensity for Semaglutide.
Evaluate FAERS and publication-derived safety-risk posture for Semaglutide.
Retrieve internal reimbursement and launch context for Semaglutide in US.
Summarize recent Semaglutide policy, pricing, and partnership developments in US.
